name: Arsip page displays archives and supports search

planSteps.description: Fill the email input with 'admin@siwono.local' and the password input with 'password123'
Click the 'Arsip' link in the sidebar
Verify the page heading 'Daftar Induk Arsip Warkah' is visible and the table loads the list of archives from the database
Verify the table shows archives matching the search term
